question: Show the capital of the region that has the most buildings.
sql: SELECT r.Capital FROM region r JOIN (SELECT Region_ID, COUNT(*) AS num_buildings FROM building GROUP BY Region_ID) b ON r.Region_ID = b.Region_ID ORDER BY b.num_buildings DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 获取拥有最多建筑的地区的首都

semantic.reason: order_by字段中的num_buildings列未在原始问题中提及，且未明确说明如何关联region表与building表以获取Capital列
